steps.task: Create builder_runtime_config table for runtime mode switching
steps.spec: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS builder_runtime_config with columns: id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), mode text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'run', updated_at timestamptz DEFAULT now(), updated_by text; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS builder_mode_receipts with columns: id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), mode text NOT NULL, triggered_by text, receipt_payload jsonb, created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now(). All CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS only. No JS imports. Migration is idempotent.

steps.task: Implement runtime mode read/write service backed by builder_runtime_config
steps.spec: Export async functions: getCurrentMode(db) returns {mode,updated_at,updated_by}; setMode(db,mode,triggeredBy,receiptPayload) upserts builder_runtime_config (single-row pattern keyed on a fixed sentinel id or ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE) and inserts a builder_mode_receipts row; getReceipts(db,limit) returns recent receipts. Uses only pg pool passed as argument — no top-level imports beyond node builtins. Throws descriptive Error on invalid mode values (allowed: 'run','dry_run','paused').

steps.task: Wire POST /command-center/mode and GET /command-center/mode live using builder-runtime-mode-service
steps.spec: Export registerCommandCenterModeRoutes(app,deps) where deps={db,callCouncilMember}. GET /api/v1/lifeos/command-center/mode returns {mode,updated_at,updated_by}. POST /api/v1/lifeos/command-center/mode accepts {mode,triggered_by} body, validates mode enum, calls setMode, returns receipt. All errors return {error:string} with appropriate HTTP status. No top-level browser globals. Import only node builtins and ../services/builder-runtime-mode-service.js.
steps.last_error: route module not auto-registered — add {"path":"routes/command-center-mode-routes.js","register":"<registerFn>","enabled":true} to config/auto-registered-product-modules.json so the endpoint actually mounts LIVE (built + deployed but unreachable = false done)

steps.task: Implement phase14 cert service reading phase_ledger from findingsJson
steps.spec: Export async function getPhase14Cert(db) that queries the findings store (SELECT findings_json FROM builder_findings ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1 using CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS builder_findings guard at top via a one-time DDL check) and extracts phase_ledger array from findingsJson. Returns {certified:bool, phase_ledger:[], generated_at:isoString, summary:{total,passed,failed}}. If no findings row exists returns {certified:false,phase_ledger:[],generated_at:now,summary:{total:0,passed:0,failed:0}}. No AI SDK imports; no browser globals.

Export registerPhase14CertRoutes(app,deps) where deps={db}. GET /api/v1/builder/cert/phase14 calls getPhase14Cert(db) and returns JSON result with Cache-Control no-store. On error returns {error:message} 500. Import only ../services/phase14-cert-service.js. No browser globals.

steps.task: Implement pending Adam query service with priority sort and type badges
steps.spec: Export async function getPendingAdam(db,opts={}) that queries pending_adam table (SELECT id,title,type,priority,status,created_at FROM pending_adam WHERE status NOT IN ('resolved','dismissed') ORDER BY priority ASC, created_at ASC LIMIT coalesce(opts.limit,50)). Export async function resolveAdamItem(db,id,resolvedBy) that UPDATE pending_adam SET status='resolved', resolved_at=now(), resolved_by=$2 WHERE id=$1 RETURNING *. Uses CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pending_adam guard. No browser globals. No AI imports.

steps.task: Expose pending Adam panel API endpoints
steps.spec: Export registerPendingAdamRoutes(app,deps) where deps={db}. GET /api/v1/lifeos/command-center/pending-adam returns {items:[],count,fetched_at}. POST /api/v1/lifeos/command-center/pending-adam/:id/resolve accepts {resolved_by} body, calls resolveAdamItem, returns resolved record. Validates id param is uuid-like (36 chars). Returns {error} on failure. Import only ../services/pending-adam-service.js.

steps.task: Register all new route modules so they mount at boot without editing server.js
steps.spec: Add entries for routes/command-center-mode-routes.js (registerFn:registerCommandCenterModeRoutes), routes/phase14-cert-routes.js (registerFn:registerPhase14CertRoutes), routes/pending-adam-routes.js (registerFn:registerPendingAdamRoutes) to the modules array. Preserve all existing entries. Each entry shape: {file,registerFn,deps:[]} where deps lists string keys the boot loader should pass from its shared deps object (db, callCouncilMember as applicable). JSON must be valid and minifiable.

steps.task: Build Pending Adam panel UI with priority sort, type badges, one-click resolve
steps.spec: Self-contained dark HTML panel. Polls GET /api/v1/lifeos/command-center/pending-adam every 15s. Renders items as cards with color-coded type badge (research/yellow, decision/red, approval/blue, review/grey), priority number chip, title, created_at relative time. Each card has Resolve button that calls POST .../resolve with {resolved_by:'operator'} then refreshes list. No external CDN — inline CSS only. Mobile-friendly flex layout. No window.fetch polyfill needed (modern browsers). Served as static file.

steps.task: Build Projects Dashboard panel with hover tooltip and click drawer drill-down
steps.spec: Self-contained dark HTML panel. Fetches GET /api/v1/lifeos/command-center/mission-dashboard on load and every 10s. Renders project cards from active_jobs and recent_completed arrays. Hover shows tooltip with {estimate, actual, status}. Click opens slide-in drawer (position:fixed right panel) showing build_plan array, verification_status badge, estimates table. Drawer closes on backdrop click or Esc key. All JS inline. No external CDN. No window globals beyond standard browser API. founder_gated because it is customer-facing UI surface.

steps.task: Build runtime mode switcher UI panel wired to POST /command-center/mode
steps.spec: Self-contained dark HTML panel. On load GETs /api/v1/lifeos/command-center/mode and displays current badge (RUN=green, DRY_RUN=amber, PAUSED=red). Three buttons: Run Now, Dry Run, Pause — each POST {mode:'run'|'dry_run'|'paused', triggered_by:'operator'} then re-fetches status. Shows last receipt payload in collapsible <pre>. Confirms destructive mode changes with window.confirm. Polls every 30s. Inline CSS only dark theme. No external CDN.

steps.task: Update cert script to write phase_ledger into builder_findings table
steps.spec: ESM script. Imports pg from 'pg' (already installed). Reads FINDINGS_JSON_PATH env (default: ./findings.json) with fs/promises readFile. Parses JSON, extracts or derives phase_ledger array (array of {phase,status:'pass'|'fail',note} objects from top-level phases key or constructs from findings array). Upserts one row into builder_findings: INSERT INTO builder_findings(findings_json) VALUES($1) — table created by phase14-cert-service guard so script does not need DDL. Logs {rows_affected, phase_ledger_length} to stdout. Exits 0 on success, 1 on error. No uuid package — DB generates id. Uses DATABASE_URL env for pg connection.
